items.title: Dow Jones Movers: IBM Leads, Sherwin-Williams Drags as Analysts Clash on Salesforce
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (NYSE: DIA) had a rough week, falling 2.95% as tariff anxiety, macro uncertainty, and a VIX spike to 23.75 rattled blue-chip investors. That fear gauge is now sitting at its 88th percentile over the past year, we’ll see if that continues as much of this week’s sell-off came from worries the ...
